title: Why BTW Went Up Yesterday
summary: Bitway was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, gaining 40.1% over 24 hours while attracting active market participation.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers with a 40.1% move.
Roughly $80M in 24-hour trading volume suggests active short-term participation.
The move may reflect renewed momentum interest as traders rotated into recent outperformers.
